## Checklist

- [ ] I read the [Contributing Guide](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] My PR targets the `main` branch
- [ ] My branch is named `issue/<number>` (or has a descriptive suffix)
- [ ] My commits are small and meaningful (no large AI-generated commits)
- [ ] I added comments / doc comments where the intent isn't obvious
- [ ] I tested my changes locally (`pnpm test`, `pnpm lint`)
- [ ] This PR does not break existing behaviour / config format

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] Documentation / config
- [ ] Other (please describe):
